name: BookLore
description: An app for managing and reading books
compose:
name: slashnode-booklore
services:
  web:
    image: ghcr.io/booklore-app/booklore:v2.3.0
    container_name: booklore-web
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      db:
        condition: service_started
    environment:
      DATABASE_URL: jdbc:mariadb://booklore-db:3306/booklore
      DATABASE_USERNAME: bookloreuser
      DATABASE_PASSWORD: booklorepass
    volumes:
      - web_data-app:/app/data
      - web_data-books:/books
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:6060:6060
  db:
    image: mariadb:12.0.2
    container_name: booklore-db
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    user: '1000:1000'
    environment:
      MARIADB_DATABASE: booklore
      MARIADB_USER: bookloreuser
      MARIADB_PASSWORD: booklorepass
      MARIADB_ROOT_PASSWORD: rootpass
    volumes:
      - db_data-db:/var/lib/mysql
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data-app:
    name: slashnode-booklore_web_data-app
  web_data-books:
    name: slashnode-booklore_web_data-books
  db_data-db:
    name: slashnode-booklore_db_data-db
